summary: Completed testing of Basketball Bonus Rules feature. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend UI tests verified: Bonus Rules section visible on NewGame page for basketball, checkboxes for Bonus and Double Bonus work correctly, preset buttons (College 7/10, NBA 5 fouls, High School 7/10) function properly, LiveGame shows bonus buttons that cycle through null→bonus→double_bonus→null states.
seed_data_creation: Test teams and games created during pytest execution, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Basketball bonus rules feature fully tested. Backend stores bonus_enabled, double_bonus_enabled, bonus_fouls, double_bonus_fouls fields. Auto-calculation of bonus status works when fouls are recorded. Frontend NewGame page shows Bonus Rules section only for basketball with preset buttons. LiveGame shows bonus buttons with opponent foul indicators.

Playwright test - buttons visible and toggle works

details.display: BONUS in yellow, 2X BONUS in red
details.verified_via: Backend test - share endpoint returns bonus fields
pytest - all game creation tests passed
